hero.description: From middle school to the baccalaureate, access video courses, corrected exercises, national exams and private tutors for all subjects in the Moroccan education system.

categories.title: All Moroccan curriculum subjects
categories.description: Courses, exercises and exams for every subject, from middle school to the baccalaureate.

featuredCourses.title: Popular courses
featuredCourses.description: The most followed courses by Moroccan students.

topTeachers.title: Top-rated teachers
topTeachers.description: Qualified and experienced teachers in the Moroccan education system.

benefits.title: Everything you need to succeed
benefits.description: A complete platform designed for Moroccan students, from middle school to Bac.
benefits.b1Desc: Structured courses from middle school to Bac, adapted to the official Moroccan curriculum.
benefits.b2Desc: Access subjects and corrections of past regional and national exams.
benefits.b3Desc: Find a tutor near you or online for personalized private lessons.
benefits.b4Desc: Guides and articles to help you choose your track and orientation after Bac.

testimonials.title: What our students say
testimonials.description: Join thousands of students who improved their results with EduMaroc.
testimonials.t1Text: Thanks to EduMaroc, I got 18/20 in math on the national exam! The courses are clear and the corrected exercises really helped me.
testimonials.t2Text: The teachers on EduMaroc explain better than my teachers at school. I found an online physics-chemistry teacher who saved my year!
testimonials.t3Text: The Tawjih section really helped me choose my track. I found all the info about prep schools and engineering schools.
testimonials.t4Text: My son improved his average by 4 points thanks to the courses and corrected exams. I recommend this platform to all parents!

cta.studentDesc: Access courses, corrected exams and exercises for all levels. Free registration!
cta.teacherDesc: Share your expertise with Moroccan students. Publish your courses, give private lessons and earn income.

footer.description: The educational platform for Moroccan students. Courses, exams, private tutors and Tawjih guidance.
